verb.frequency: Oxford English Corpus 빈도 상위 (회화·문어 핵심)

meanings.example: I'll give you the report by Friday.
Could you give me a few minutes to explain?
Let me give you an example of layering.

chunks.example: We give priority to high-risk merchant reviews.
Let me give you an example of structuring.
Could you give me feedback on this CDD form?
The customer must give consent for data sharing.
Unusual transaction patterns gave rise to concerns.

pronTip.title: GIVE 동사 발음 핵심
points: 강세: I'll GIVE you a hand (give에 강세)

listening.title: AML 신입 교육·피드백 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: Could you give the new hire some feedback on her first STR? Staff: Sure. I'll give her a few examples of well-written cases. Manager: Good. We give priority to training quality. Staff: Understood. The customer didn't give consent for additional checks, so I'll explain that part too. Manager: That kind of issue gives rise to compliance gaps. Make sure she knows.

blanks.suffix: the new hire some feedback on her first STR?
her a few examples of well-written cases.
for additional checks, so I'll explain that part too.

examples5.label: 전달
examples5.en: I'll give you the meeting notes by 3 PM.

examples5.label: 우선순위
examples5.en: We give priority to PEP-related cases.

examples5.label: 예시 제시
examples5.en: Let me give an example of how layering works.

examples5.label: 피드백
examples5.en: Could you give me feedback on the new SOP?
examples5.ko: 새 SOP에 대한 피드백을 주실 수 있나요?

examples5.label: 야기
examples5.en: Repeated false positives give rise to alert fatigue.
examples5.ko: 반복된 false positive는 알람 피로를 야기합니다.

writing5.en: I'll give you the report by Friday.
We give priority to high-risk merchant reviews.
Let me give you an example of structuring.

writing5.ko: 이 CDD 양식에 대한 피드백 좀 주실 수 있나요?
writing5.en: Could you give me feedback on this CDD form?

writing5.ko: 고객은 데이터 공유에 반드시 동의해야 합니다.
writing5.en: The customer must give consent for data sharing.

challenge3sec.en: I'll give you the report tomorrow.
Let me give you an example.
Let's give priority to this case.
This pattern gives rise to concerns.
Could you give me a moment?

freewrite.situation: 신입 동료에게 본인이 진행한 케이스에 대해 설명하고 피드백을 주는 상황을 영어로 작성하세요. 어떤 예시를 들고, 어떤 우선순위를 알려주고, 어떤 동의가 필요한지 GIVE 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: give priority to, give an example, give feedback, give consent, give rise to
freewrite.placeholder: 예: When training new analysts, I always give an example of a real case I've worked on. I give priority to teaching how to recognize structuring patterns...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
피드백 교환, 우선순위 정리, 예시 공유 — GIVE 동사가 전달의 핵심!

dialog.text: Could you give me feedback on this draft?
Sure. Let me give it a quick read.
Thanks. I'll give you the final version after lunch.
Which cases should we give priority to this week?
Let me give you the top three.
Good. Give me the list by EOD.
How's the new hire doing? Have you given her feedback?
I gave her detailed feedback on her first STR. I also gave her several examples to study.
What gave rise to her main mistakes?
She wasn't giving priority to the counterparty network analysis.
Good catch. Give her a chance to redo it.
Already done. She's giving it another pass this week.

rolePlay.scenario: 본부장과 신입 컴플라이언스 직원의 멘토링 진행 상황을 논의하세요. 어떤 피드백을 줬고, 어떤 예시를 활용했고, 어떤 우선순위를 강조했는지 GIVE 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Quick check-in on the new hire. Have you given her structured feedback yet, and what examples are you giving her to learn from? I want to make sure we're giving priority to the right skills early on.

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
자료 송부, 피드백 요청, 동의 안내 — 격식 갖춘 GIVE 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, I'll give you the updated KYC template by EOD.
Thanks! Could you also give me an example of a completed one?
Sure, I'll give you one from last quarter.
Hi, attached is the new SOP. Could you give it a review?
I'll give you my feedback by Wednesday.
Much appreciated. Take your time.
Hi, our merchant is asking why they need to give consent for additional verification.
Thank you for reaching out. Let me give you the regulatory context.
Under our AML obligations, we must give priority to customer consent before sharing data.
Could you give us an example of what triggers this?
Sure. Cross-border transactions over a threshold give rise to enhanced verification requirements.
Got it. We'll give the merchant the full explanation.
Thanks. Please give me feedback if they have follow-up questions.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국 가맹점이 추가 검증 동의 절차에 대해 문의 이메일을 보냈습니다. 규정 배경, 예시, 동의가 필요한 이유를 GIVE 동사로 정중하게 안내하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Account Manager at an overseas merchant
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, our merchant is pushing back on giving consent for the additional KYC checks. Could you give us a clear explanation we can pass on, and maybe an example of when this is required? They want to understand what gives rise to the extra step.

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
우선순위 부여, 패턴 예시, 동의 검증 — GIVE 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: Which alerts should we give priority to today?
I'd give priority to the cross-border ones.
Agreed. Give me a status update by 4 PM.
Could you give me an example of layering?
Sure. Let me give you a real case from last quarter.
Thanks. That gives me a much clearer picture.
How does your team give priority to alerts?
We give priority based on a tiered scoring model. Let me give you an example.
Please do.
A merchant with PEP exposure and cross-border activity gives rise to top priority.
Did the customer give consent for the data sharing in this case?
They gave consent at onboarding. We always give consent forms with clear scope.
Good. Could you give me a copy of your prioritization SOP?
Of course. I'll give it to you with redactions for client data.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU 검사관이 본인 팀의 알람 우선순위 부여 프로세스에 대해 인터뷰를 진행합니다. 어떤 기준으로, 어떤 예시로, 어떤 동의 절차로 운영하는지 GIVE 동사로 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Today I'd like to focus on alert prioritization and customer consent. Could you give me an overview of how your team gives priority to alerts, give me a concrete example of a high-priority case, and explain how customer consent is handled?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
의견 공유, 사례 제시, 조언 교환 — 부드러운 GIVE 동사!

dialog.text: Could you give me your honest opinion?
Sure, let me give you my take.
Appreciate the feedback.
Could you give an example of how Korean PGs handle this?
Sure. Let me give you our approach.
Helpful. That gives me a better picture.
What gives rise to most STRs in Korean PGs?
Let me give you a concrete example. Most cases give rise to filing because of cross-border anomalies.
Do you give priority to those over local cases?
We give equal weight, but cross-border ones tend to get more reviewer time.
Could you give me feedback on our prioritization model? I'll send it later.
Happy to. I'll give you my notes within a week.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스 자리에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 동료와 알람 우선순위 모델을 비교·토론하세요. 본인 회사의 사례, 결정 기준, 상호 피드백을 GIVE 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Sofia, Head of Financial Crime at a Mexican fintech
rolePlay.aiOpening: Loved your panel. Could you give me a quick rundown of how Korean PGs prioritize alerts? I'd love to give you our model in return — we're rebuilding it and could use external feedback.

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
선물, 조언, 부탁 — 가장 친숙한 GIVE 동사 패턴!

dialog.text: Could you give me some advice?
Sure, give me the context first.
Thanks. I'll give you the full story.
Could you give me a hand with the groceries?
Sure, I'll give you a hand right now.
Thanks, that gives me time to start dinner.
I'm stuck on a career decision. Could you give me some perspective?
Of course. Give me the situation.
I have two job offers, but neither feels perfect.
Let me give you my honest take. Which one gives you more growth?
The startup, but it gives less stability.
I'd give priority to growth at this stage of your career. But give yourself time to feel it out.

rolePlay.scenario: 친구가 진로 고민을 털어놓습니다. 본인의 경험, 우선순위, 실제 사례를 GIVE 동사를 활용해 자연스럽게 조언하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Jake, a college friend considering a career change
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hey, I really need someone to give me a reality check. I've got two offers and I can't decide. Mind giving me your honest opinion? I just need someone to give me a different perspective.
